name: headhunter-platform
description: Headhunter Collaboration Platform - A B2B collaboration platform for headhunters

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.test: npm run test:integration && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npm run format:frontend && npm run format:backend
scripts.format:frontend: cd frontend && npm run format || true
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:frontend && npm run type-check:backend
scripts.type-check:frontend: cd frontend && npm run type-check || true
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker-compose down && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up -d
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cp backend/.env.example backend/.env && cp frontend/.env.example frontend/.env.local
scripts.setup:docker: npm run docker:up && sleep 10 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed

author: Headhunter Platform Team
